component.name: Speech to Text
component.summary: Local offline speech-to-text transcription using Whisper

description.p: Speech to Text is a local-first speech transcription application for Linux. Transcription runs entirely on your machine (Whisper, Cohere or Qwen3-ASR); your audio never leaves your device and no internet is needed after the model is downloaded. Optional, clearly opt-in features use the network when enabled: the "Improve with AI" / LLM integration sends transcript text to an LLM endpoint you configure (which may be a cloud service), and the app can check for updates.

ul.li: Local transcription — your audio never leaves your device
Supports 99 languages with automatic detection
GPU acceleration support (NVIDIA CUDA, AMD ROCm)
Five Whisper model sizes from Tiny (75 MB) to Large v3 (3 GB)
Real-time confidence scoring
Transcription history with search
Translation to English from any supported language
Light, dark, and system theme support
Downloaded runtimes and models are verified against published hashes before use
API keys and tokens are masked and stored only in the system keyring
Config and history are written privately (0600) and atomically
The LLM endpoint requires HTTPS for non-local hosts; first-use consent shows the target host
Auto-paste is now off by default for new installs and can be revoked
Optional startup update check can be disabled in Settings
Clear-all history now asks for confirmation

description.p: Dictate anywhere and run in the background.

ul.li: Mini Panel: dictate into any app with a global shortcut — transcribes, pastes into the focused app, and stays open so you can dictate again
System tray icon and background mode
Dictation modes: Plain, Message, Email, Note, and Code Prompt
Whisper Large v3 Turbo models
Engine selector moved to Settings → Model (“Default Engine”)
Translate to English now also applies to the mini panel
Fixed auto-detect language producing empty transcriptions
Fixed Cohere Transcribe language handling
Fixed recording getting stuck repeating old text
